text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Whoa! I knew I was right to believe in<n>you!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I don't need a horoscope to tell me<n>you're my
lucky person, Trainer!<n>Thank you so, sooo much!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
With my lucky plushie in hand, I feel<n>like I can do
anything!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe! Not only is it adorable, but I<n>get the feeling
it has a mystical aura<n>to it too!
